channel.title: Flow Separation on FEBUS lab
channel.description: Recent content in Flow Separation on FEBUS lab

item.title: Coherent turbulent structures in unsteady separated TBLs
item.description: Identification, tracking, and characterization of large-scale turbulent structures in turbulent boundary layers with unsteady separation.

item.title: Unveiling the marvel of shark-skin for fluid mechanics
item.description: Identification, tracking, and characterization of large-scale turbulent structures in turbulent boundary layers with unsteady separation.

item.title: Turbulent boundary layers with strong unsteady pressure gradients
item.description: Wall-resolved Large Eddy Simulations (WRLES) of spatially developing turbulent boundary layers with strong unsteady presssure gradients.

item.title: Influence of Time-Varying Freestream Conditions on the Dynamics of Unsteady Bo undary-Layer Separation
item.description: Influence of Time-Varying Freestream Conditions on the Dynamics of Unsteady Boundary-Layer Separation.

item.title: Characterization of unsteady separation in a turbulent boundary layer: Reynold s stresses and flow dynamics
item.description: Characterization of unsteady separation in a turbulent boundary layer: Reynolds stresses and flow dynamics.

item.title: Characterization of unsteady separation in a turbulent boundary layer: mean an d phase-averaged flow
item.description: Characterization of unsteady separation in a turbulent boundary layer: mean and phase-averaged flow.
In *12th international symposium on Tubulence and Shear Flow Phenomena*.

item.title: Large-eddy simulations of a turbulent boundary layer with unsteady pressure gr adients
item.description: In *12th international symposium on Tubulence and Shear Flow Phenomena*.
